rationale: Ground truth for this trivial rename PR is essentially empty (bot noise + a plain 'lgtm' approve), so both candidates trivially achieve full recall with nothing to miss. X thoroughly re-verifies the mechanical rename is consistent and matches upstream but ends in a pure approve with only one non-actionable observational note. Y performs the same verification sweep plus surfaces a concrete, diff-grounded gap (missing 404-fallback test for create_chat_completion, mirroring the three sibling tests that were updated) with a specific proposed test name and file:line, which is genuinely more actionable; its second nit (adding an explanatory comment) is low-value but still grounded, not fabricated.
